Operation 'getDishMenus' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks specificity about inputs (dish ID requirement), outputs (paginated collection, Menu object structure), and domain context (historical menus from NYPL). Enhanced version clarifies the dish ID parameter, explains the paginated response format, and provides domain context about historical menu data to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns all menus that contain a specific dish
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all menus containing a specific dish
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all historical menus from the NYPL collection that contain a specific dish. Requires the dish ID as a path parameter. Returns a paginated collection of Menu objects with complete menu details including date, restaurant, and all dishes. Useful for exploring the historical context and popularity of a particular dish across different restaurants and time periods.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about inputs (dish ID requirement), outputs (paginated collection, Menu object structure), and domain context (historical menus from NYPL). Enhanced version clarifies the dish ID parameter, explains the paginated response format, and provides domain context about historical menu data to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'searchDishes' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary and description are too generic and lack domain context. Enhanced version specifies this searches historical menus from NYPL, clarifies input parameters (name, optional filters), explains the paginated Dish object response format, and provides historical context (1850s onwards) to help AI agents understand the scope and purpose of this search operation.

data.current_description: Search for dishes by name or other criteria
data.summary_suggestion: Search historical dishes by name and criteria
data.description_suggestion: Searches the NYPL's historical menu database for dishes matching specified criteria. Accepts search parameters including dish name and optional filters. Returns a paginated collection of Dish objects with matching results, including dish names, descriptions, and associated menu information. Supports partial name matching and multiple filter criteria to help discover dishes from the historical menu collection dating back to the 1850s.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too generic and lack domain context. Enhanced version specifies this searches historical menus from NYPL, clarifies input parameters (name, optional filters), explains the paginated Dish object response format, and provides historical context (1850s onwards) to help AI agents understand the scope and purpose of this search operation.

message: Operation 'listMenus' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is too generic and lacks specificity about what filtering options are available, what fields are returned, and the pagination structure. Added details about historical context, specific filter types, and pagination metadata to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns a paginated list of menus with optional filtering
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of historical menus from the NYPL collection. Supports filtering by date range, restaurant name, and other criteria. Returns menu objects with pagination metadata including total count and page information. Use this to browse or discover menus matching specific search criteria.
data.reasoning: Description is too generic and lacks specificity about what filtering options are available, what fields are returned, and the pagination structure. Added details about historical context, specific filter types, and pagination metadata to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getMenu' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Description lacks specificity about what 'detailed information' includes. Added concrete examples of returned fields (restaurant name, date, location, pages) and clarified the Menu object structure to help AI agents understand the complete response.

data.current_description: Returns detailed information about a specific menu
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive details for a specific menu by its ID, including metadata such as restaurant name, date, location, and associated pages. Returns a Menu object with all available properties. Use this to access full menu information after identifying a menu of interest.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about what 'detailed information' includes. Added concrete examples of returned fields (restaurant name, date, location, pages) and clarified the Menu object structure to help AI agents understand the complete response.

message: Operation 'getMenuPages' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description is too brief and doesn't explain what pages represent in the context of historical menus. Added clarification that pages are scanned images/sections, what metadata they contain, and the use case for retrieving them to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Returns all pages for a specific menu
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all Page objects associated with a specific menu by menu ID. Each page represents a scanned image or section of the historical menu document. Returns a collection of Page objects with image references and page-level metadata. Use this to access individual menu pages for detailed viewing or analysis.
data.reasoning: Description is too brief and doesn't explain what pages represent in the context of historical menus. Added clarification that pages are scanned images/sections, what metadata they contain, and the use case for retrieving them to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getMenuDishes' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks context about what information is included with each dish and the historical significance. Added details about dish properties (names, descriptions, prices) and clarified the historical context to help AI agents understand the operation's purpose and output structure.

data.current_description: Returns all dishes for a specific menu
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all Dish objects listed on a specific menu by menu ID. Returns a collection of dishes with their names, descriptions, prices (if available), and other historical details from that menu. Use this to explore what food items were offered at a particular restaurant during a specific time period.
data.reasoning: Description lacks context about what information is included with each dish and the historical significance. Added details about dish properties (names, descriptions, prices) and clarified the historical context to help AI agents understand the operation's purpose and output structure.

message: Operation 'searchMenus' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Both summary and description are too vague about search capabilities. Summary doesn't indicate it's a search operation. Description doesn't specify what 'various criteria' means or what the search actually searches across. Added specificity about search scope (full-text, metadata, dishes), pagination, and use cases for better AI agent guidance.

data.current_description: Search for menus by various criteria
data.summary_suggestion: Search historical menus by keyword or criteria
data.description_suggestion: Searches the NYPL menu collection using a query parameter to find menus matching specified criteria such as restaurant names, dishes, dates, or locations. Returns a paginated list of matching Menu objects. Supports full-text search across menu metadata and associated dishes. Use this for targeted discovery of menus based on specific search terms.
data.reasoning: Both summary and description are too vague about search capabilities. Summary doesn't indicate it's a search operation. Description doesn't specify what 'various criteria' means or what the search actually searches across. Added specificity about search scope (full-text, metadata, dishes), pagination, and use cases for better AI agent guidance.

message: Operation 'listDishes' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks detail about available filters and what information is returned with each dish. Added specificity about filtering options, pagination structure, and use cases to help AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Returns a paginated list of dishes
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all dishes from the NYPL menu collection. Supports filtering by name, menu ID, date range, and other criteria. Returns Dish objects with pagination metadata. Use this to browse historical dishes or discover dishes matching specific filter criteria across all menus.
data.reasoning: Description lacks detail about available filters and what information is returned with each dish. Added specificity about filtering options, pagination structure, and use cases to help AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'getDish' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Description is too generic about what 'detailed information' includes. Added concrete examples of returned fields (name, description, price, menu information) and emphasized historical context to help AI agents understand the complete response structure.

data.current_description: Returns detailed information about a specific dish
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive details for a specific dish by its ID, including name, description, price (if available), and associated menu information. Returns a Dish object with all available properties and historical context. Use this to access full dish information after identifying a dish of interest.
data.reasoning: Description is too generic about what 'detailed information' includes. Added concrete examples of returned fields (name, description, price, menu information) and emphasized historical context to help AI agents understand the complete response structure.
